scripts.test:server: cd server && unset UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT && uv run pytest tests/ -x -q
scripts.lint:server: cd server && unset UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT && uv run ruff check src/ && uv run mypy src/
scripts.test:all: devbox run test:server && devbox run test:client
scripts.lint:all: devbox run lint:server && devbox run lint:client
